description: Data-center architectural spec cites a stale '2015 IBC' edition in a door section; verifier correctly corrected to the current adopted IBC edition with a grounded code-publisher citation.

finding.issue: Specification cites the 2015 IBC; the current base model code is the 2024 IBC and the project's adopted edition governs.

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Comply with 2015 IBC Chapter 7 for all fire-rated door assemblies.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: The 2015 IBC is three cycles behind the current 2024 edition. The specification must reference the IBC edition adopted for the project's jurisdiction; 2015 is stale for a new-build data center.

ground_truth.notes: 2015 IBC is stale; the 2024 IBC is current and the project's adopted edition controls. The fix defers to the adopted edition rather than hardcoding a year — the zero-pinned-standards posture.
